scripts.render:sources: python3 -m pip --disable-pip-version-check install --upgrade --target ./.python_packages -r requirements.txt >/dev/null && python3 scripts/render_source_pages.py
scripts.ingest:weapons: python3 -m pip --disable-pip-version-check install --upgrade --target ./.python_packages -r requirements.txt >/dev/null && PYTHONPATH=.python_packages python3 scripts/ingest_weapons_pdf.py && tsx scripts/load_seed.ts --optional
